arabic_text: إِنَّ لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَلْبًا، وَقَلْبُ الْقُرْآنِ يس
alt_text: Arabic hadith: 'For everything there is a heart, and the heart of the Qur'an is Ya-Sin.' — Well-known hadith on the special status of Sura Ya-Sin.
notes: Famous hadith attributed to the Prophet about Sura Ya-Sin (Q36) being the 'heart of the Qur'an'.
